name: sheets-modelling-local
description: Local marketplace for the sheets-modelling plugin. Install by adding this directory as a marketplace in Claude Code.

plugins.name: sheets-modelling
plugins.description: Google Sheets modelling best practices — FAST, tidy data, classic colour convention, audit-first workflow, 3-pass build with formatting phase and post-write sanity gate. Plus financial-modelling-extras (DCF, football field, M&A pro forma, synergies).
